summary: Improved chat TUI tool transparency: added src/utils/tool-display.ts (formatToolArgs / formatToolOutcome) for paths, line ranges, lists, commands, and compact result summaries. Wired agent tool_call to show 'Tool: name — args' and tool_result to a new UiLine type tool_out labeled 'Result:' with muted styling. Added tests/tool-display.test.ts; pnpm exec tsc and full vitest pass.
current_status: Interactive chat shows concrete tool targets and post-run outcomes alongside tool names.
